summary: Update mode: Tested new enhanced Marketing Landing Page features - Country code selector with 15 countries, multiple URL params for referral code auto-population (ref, referral, code, promo, utm_campaign), PIN code auto-fill for city/state (India only using India Post API), international phone number support, and backend storing country_code/country/state fields. All 62 tests pass (26 backend + 36 frontend).
seed_data_creation: None - using dynamic test data with unique mobile numbers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Marketing Landing Page features fully tested: 1) Country code selector with 15 countries (data-testid='country-selector') - India (+91), US (+1), UK (+44), UAE (+971), Singapore (+65), etc. 2) Multiple referral URL params supported: ?ref=, ?referral=, ?code=, ?promo=, ?utm_campaign=. 3) PIN code auto-fill (India only) uses India Post API - enters 6-digit PIN in step2-pincode field to auto-populate step2-city and step2-state. 4) International users see simplified form (city + country) vs Indian users (pincode + city + state). 5) Backend MarketingLeadCreate model accepts country_code and country fields. 6) Backend MarketingLeadStep2 model includes state field.

frontend: Country code selector is visible with default India (+91)
Country code selector dropdown shows all 15 countries
Selecting UAE country code updates form
Selecting US country code updates placeholder
Referral code auto-populates from ?referral= URL param
Referral code auto-populates from ?code= URL param
Referral code auto-populates from ?promo= URL param
Referral code auto-populates from ?utm_campaign= URL param
Referral code from ?ref= is applied correctly
PIN code field is visible for Indian users in Step 2
PIN code auto-fills city and state for valid Indian PIN
Invalid PIN code shows error toast
International user (UAE) does not see state field

features_verified.referral_url_params: Working - all 5 params supported (ref, referral, code, promo, utm_campaign)
features_verified.pincode_autofill: Working - India Post API integration for Indian PIN codes
features_verified.international_support: Working - different digit validation per country, simplified form for non-Indian users
features_verified.backend_fields: Working - country_code, country, state fields stored correctly
